_comment: Phase 0 baseline snapshot — captured 2026-05-25 on commit ff034155
Each future Phase N PR must capture the same metrics post-merge and
verify regressions don't exceed +10% (test wall time) or shrinkage

server_package._note: Phase 0 PR added routes_snapshot_test.go + wshub_types.go + 47/37 field annotations; non-test lines grew 17156→17262 (+106) vs pre-PR baseline.

struct_fields._note: Phase 5 target: Server ≤ 12, Hub stays at 37 (5 blocks reorg). See §六.6 字段去向表.

routes._note: 50 dashboard handler routes + 1 /health + 1 /ws + 1 /ws-node + 3 /api/debug/* (pprof + vars + pprof/) — design.md baseline counted only the 50 dashboard handler routes.

linter._note: 10 over-size files (server.go=1309 .. wshub.go=579) frozen at Phase 0; 7 *Server.handle* methods locked. New violations of either fail in mode=fail (Phase 5).
